title: Hukumachi Rani Hee
desc: A Marathi serial focusing on the journey of a strong woman balancing love, family, and challenges, while showcasing values, emotions, and resilience against adversity.

title: Hukumachi Rani Hi
desc: Rani, who is devoted to her family, does not hesitate to battle injustice. She crosses paths with Indrajeet, an unscrupulous tycoon whose ego-driven ambition knows no bounds.

title: Sakha Majha Pandurang
desc: Devoted to Lord Vitthal, Sakhu's faith and selflessness bring her closer to the divine but spark jealousy, leading to suffering. Yet, her unwavering devotion proves the power of faith and love.

title: Sakha Majha Pandurang
desc: Sakhu, a devotee of Lord Vitthal, has the power to connect with her God. However, jealousy strikes among those around her, making her life difficult.

title: Inspector Manju
desc: Inspector Manju confronts crime with courage and intelligence, balancing justice with personal struggles, standing strong against threats in a gripping tale of duty and resilience.

title: Inspector Manju
desc: Timid Manju, now a bold inspector, must arrest Satya, Satara's beloved vigilante, as their complicated past intertwines with present challenges.

title: Julali Gaath Ga
desc: Social media influencer Saavi bravely fights injustice, upholding her grandfather's legacy while facing the ruthless Dhairya. Join her journey of love and resilience against betrayal and oppression.

desc: The life of a cheerful girl who believes in equality takes a turn when she meets a man who does not value women and their ambitions.

title: Tu Anolakhi Tari Sobati
desc: A romantic drama portraying an unexpected bond between two individuals navigating destiny, identity, and companionship.

title: Tu Anolakhi Tari Sobati
desc: A boy and a girl who love their families over everything else become friends, only to be separated by fate and later united in marriage.

title: Mee Sansar Majha Rekhite
desc: A family's emotional journey unfolds through challenges, love, and unity as they navigate life's unexpected turns with resilience.

title: Mee Sansar Majha Rekhite
desc: Anupriya breaks free from her roles as wife and mother to discover her true self, supported by her daughter as she enters the workforce and establishes her own identity.

title: Tujhyasathi Tujhyasanga
desc: Teja is madly in love with Vaidehi, who rejects him. Fate steps in, and a mass marriage forces them together, turning their lives upside down and setting the stage for unexpected twists.
